title: The Gen Z Kitchen Festival: What’s Cooking in the Western Balkans [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: In this video, policymakers, researchers, and young activists reflect on the findings of the first region‑wide Gen Z study conducted across the Western Balkans.
summary_public: In this video, policymakers, researchers, and young activists reflect on the findings of the first region‑wide Gen Z study conducted across the Western Balkans.
